meta.title: Static Site Generation (SSG) in Next.js
meta.excerpt: Build blazing-fast pages at build time for optimal performance and SEO. Learn when and how to use SSG for maximum performance.

props.content: SSG pre-renders pages at build time, generating static HTML files that can be cached and served instantly from a CDN. This results in the fastest possible page loads and excellent SEO.
With SSG, your pages are generated once during the build process. The resulting HTML is then served to every user identically, making it perfect for content that doesn't change frequently.

steps.title: Build Time
steps.description: Pages are rendered to HTML during build

props.content: In Next.js App Router, pages are statically generated by default when they don't use dynamic functions like cookies(), headers(), or searchParams.
Any page without dynamic data fetching is automatically static:
Fetch data at build time with async Server Components:
Pre-render dynamic routes at build time:

steps.title: Maximum Performance
steps.description: Pre-built HTML served directly from CDN edge nodes means the fastest possible Time to First Byte (TTFB).

steps.title: Excellent SEO
steps.description: Search engines receive fully-rendered HTML immediately, ensuring all content is crawlable and indexable.

steps.title: Cost Effective
steps.description: No server compute required per request. Static files can be served at minimal cost from CDN providers.

steps.title: High Reliability
steps.description: Static files rarely fail. No database connections, no server errors, just fast, reliable content delivery.

steps.title: Easy Caching
steps.description: CDNs can cache static content indefinitely until the next build, reducing origin server load to zero.

props.content: In our electrical services documentation, we use SSG for all documentation pages. Since documentation content changes infrequently and is the same for all users, SSG provides the best experience:

features.title: Documentation pages
features.description: Pre-rendered at build time for instant access

features.title: Marketing pages
features.description: Static for maximum performance and SEO

props.content: Use SSG for content that doesn't change per-request and is the same for all users. It's the fastest, most cost-effective, and most reliable rendering strategy available. When combined with CDN distribution and proper cache headers, SSG provides the optimal foundation for high-performance web applications.
